Our Story

Growing More Than
Just Crops

Nestled in the heart of Chintakunta Village, Putlur Mandal, Anantapur District, ChandraFarms is a family-owned farm built on a single belief — that food grown with love and without chemicals is the best gift you can give your family.

For over a decade, we've been cultivating pomegranates, mosambi, groundnuts, and Bengal gram using traditional and sustainable farming methods. No pesticides. No artificial fertilizers. Just rich Andhra soil, clean water, and the dedication of real farmers.

Kummetha Chakradhar Reddy Founder · S/o Kummetha Chandra Sekhar Reddy Chintakunta Village, Anantapur

Why ChandraFarms

The ChandraFarms Difference

We don't just sell produce — we deliver trust, freshness, and a direct connection to the land that grew your food.

🌿

Zero Chemicals

We never use pesticides or artificial fertilizers. Every product is as pure as nature intended, safe for your whole family.

👨‍🌾

Direct from Farmer

Buy directly from us — the people who grow your food. No middlemen means better prices and fresher produce.

🌅

Freshly Harvested

We harvest only on demand. Your order is picked fresh from the farm and packed within hours for maximum freshness.

🚚

Fast Delivery

Local same-day delivery in Anantapur and pan-India courier shipping. Farm-fresh at your doorstep quickly.

Farm Fresh Products

Straight from Our Farm

Handpicked, sun-ripened, and packed fresh. Every product tells the story of the Anantapur soil.

Delivery Information

We Deliver Everywhere

From Anantapur to your doorstep — we ensure your order arrives quickly and in perfect condition.

🏘️

Local Delivery

Same-day delivery in Anantapur District. Order before noon and receive your fresh produce by evening!

📦

Pan-India Courier

We ship across all major Indian cities. Carefully packed to ensure freshness during transit.

⚡

Express Dispatch

Orders harvested and dispatched within 24 hours of confirmation. Speed without compromising quality.
